zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan於1510年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾馬波爾時，她的父親James Kennedy 6th of Blairquhan26歲，母親Agnes Murray20歲。她於1534年7月18日與Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles在蘇格蘭度福利爾吉德布萊特結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1545年在英國蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾特雷格萊斯享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan于1510年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾馬波爾时，她的父亲James Kennedy 6th of Blairquhan26岁，母亲Agnes Murray20岁。她于1534年7月18日与Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles在苏格兰度福利爾吉德布萊特结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1545年在英国苏格兰吉德布萊次爾特雷格萊斯享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kennedy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceannéidigh ‘descendant of Ceannéidigh’ (from ceann ‘head’ + éidigh ‘ugly’); or from the Scottish Gaelic Mac Cinnèidigh, consisting of mac ‘son’ with an equivalent name. Compare Canaday , Cannady , Cannedy , Kannady , and Kenedy .

History: Kennedy ancestral lands are found both in Ireland and in Scotland, where the family's medieval ancestral seat is sited on the Ayrshire coast, facing the Irish Sea. — The great-grandparents of President John Fitzgerald Kennedy (1917–63) came to North America as immigrants from Ireland in the 1840s. His paternal great-grandparents were Patrick Kennedy (1823–58), born in Dunganstown, County Wexford, Ireland, and Bridget Murphy, who was born probably in Owenduff, County Wexford, Ireland c. 1827; they came to Boston, MA, in 1849. His maternal great-grandparents were Thomas Fitzgerald (1823–85), who was born in Bruff, County Limerick, Ireland, and Rose Anna Cox, who was born probably in Tomregan or Kinawley, County Cavan, Ireland, c. 1835; they came to Boston, MA, in 1857. — An early Scottish Kennedy forebear of a quite different family was British colonial official Archibald Kennedy (1685–1763), the son of Alexander Kennedy of Craigoch, who emigrated to NY c. 1710.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan was born in 1510, in Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, James Kennedy 6th of Blairquhan, was 26 and her mother, Agnes Murray, was 20. She married Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles on 18 July 1534, in Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died in 1545, in Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan est née en 1510, à Maybole, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Kennedy 6th of Blairquhan, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes Murray, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles le 18 juillet 1534, à Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1545, à Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan 1510 in Maybole, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Kennedy 6th of Blairquhan 26 und ihre Mutter Agnes Murray 20. Sie hat am 18. Juli 1534 in Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Scotland Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1545 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan è nata il nel 1510 nel Maybole, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, James Kennedy 6th of Blairquhan, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Agnes Murray, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles il 18 luglio 1534, nel Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1545, nel Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhanが1510年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアメイボルで生まれた時，父James Kennedy 6th of Blairquhanは26歳，母Agnes Murrayは20歳であった。1534年7月18日にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアキルククウドブリトでSir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terreglesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1545年にイギリススコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアテレグレスで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan(이)가 1510년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 메이볼일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Kennedy 6th of Blairquhan(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Murray(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1534년 7월 18일 스컷랜드 드프리실르 커kc드브라이트에서 Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1545년 영국 스코틀랜드 커kc드브라이츠히르 터레글레스에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan nasceu em 1510, em Maybole, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, James Kennedy 6th of Blairquhan, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Murray, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles em 18 de julho de 1534, em Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1545, em Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan родилась в 1510 г. в местности меибол, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James Kennedy 6th of Blairquhan было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Murray, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles 18 июля 1534 г. в местности кирккудбраит, думфриессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1545 г. в местности тирреглесь, кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Catharine Kennedy of Blairquhan nació en 1510, en Maybole, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, James Kennedy 6th of Blairquhan, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agnes Murray, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir William Herries, III Lord Herries of Terregles el 18 de julio de 1534, en Kirkcudbright, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1545, en Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 35 años.
